steps: Find the proportion with fertilizer in the sample: 4 out of 20, so 4/20 = 0.2.
Apply that proportion to the full town: 0.2 × 260 = 52.
choiceAnalysis:
• Choice A — '3': 3/260 ≈ 1.2%, far below the 20% observed rate. ✗
  • Choice B — '5': 5/260 ≈ 1.9%, still far below 20%. ✗
  • Choice C — '13': 13/260 = 5%, corresponding to a 1/20 rate, not 4/20. ✗
  • Choice D — '52': (4/20) × 260 = 52. Correctly scales the 20% rate to all 260 lawns. ✓
That matches choice D — D is correct.
